title: Artifactory Permission Target
description: Schema for JFrog Artifactory permission targets (V2), defining access control rules for repositories and builds. Permission targets map users and groups to specific permissions on repository and build resources.

name.description: Unique name for the permission target.

repo.description: Repository permissions section defining access to repository artifacts.

build.description: Build permissions section defining access to build information.

permissionSection.description: A permission section for either repositories or builds.

repositories.description: List of repository or build repository keys this permission applies to. Use 'ANY' for all repositories, 'ANY LOCAL' for all local repos, 'ANY REMOTE' for all remote repos.

actions.description: Permission actions mapped to users and groups.

users.description: Map of usernames to their permission actions.

groups.description: Map of group names to their permission actions.

includePatterns.description: Artifact path patterns to include in this permission scope.

excludePatterns.description: Artifact path patterns to exclude from this permission scope.

permissionAction.description: A permission action that can be granted to users or groups.
